Team China concluded their Paris Olympics campaign with 40 gold, 27 silver, and 24 bronze medals, marking their best performance at an Olympics held abroad.

The success of these athletes across various disciplines demonstrates the country's efforts to expand its athletic prowess and marks a new chapter for Chinese sportsmanship on the international stage.
